file_summary: This is a JSON file containing chunked data from a code indexing system. It appears to be part of a larger index structure where code and documentation from a project repository have been processed and stored in chunks. The file contains multiple window summaries that describe various components of a FastAPI-based backend system for code analysis and question-answering, including API endpoints, repository ingestion, document chunking, FAISS indexing, and project metadata management.

line_windows.summary: Contains project rules (AGENTS.md), backend package initialization, and the main API endpoint for asking questions (ask_question) with its request/response models and helper functions for building prompts and reading metadata.
Continues with helper functions from ask.py, includes health check endpoint, and defines Pydantic models for repository loading, indexing, and search operations in repo.py.
Contains the implementation of repository loading, indexing, and semantic search API endpoints in repo.py, along with FastAPI app setup and initial definitions for the DeepSeek client service.
Includes the DeepSeek chat completion client, application settings, core module exports, and the core logic for document chunking and building/searching the FAISS index.

Contains chunk definitions from core/chunking.py (whole document chunking), core/indexing.py (SearchResult class, build_and_save_index, search_index, _load_chunks, _map_results, _ensure_dependencies), core/repo_import.py (ScannedFile, ProjectMetadata, scan_repository_files, save_project_metadata), and the beginning of core/repo_ingestion.py (RepoDocument class).

Continues with core/repo_import.py functions (scan_repository_files, save_project_metadata), then core/repo_ingestion.py classes (RepoDocument, IngestionError, IngestionResult) and the RepoIngestor class including its __init__, ingest, _iter_candidate_files, _is_ignored, and _detect_language methods.

Contains the tail end of core/repo_ingestion.py methods (_iter_candidate_files, _is_ignored, _detect_language), test utilities and tests from core/tests/test_repo_ingestion.py, and the beginning of a large JSON chunk from data/index/737c648343274bfabbcee764948ce652.chunks.json (includes AGENTS.md, backend files, core files, and project metadata).

Contains the tail end of the large JSON chunk from data/index/737c648343274bfabbcee764948ce652.chunks.json (including project metadata files, docs/PRD.md, docs/task.json, frontend/README.md) and the start of another chunk from data/index/b9e1e94f4f27422d9da9d547b41fbf21.chunks.json.
